title: Weather Station Software
description: Python software for the automatic weather station project. Reads temperature, humidity, rainfall, and wind speed from hardware sensors, applies unit-conversion transforms, and publishes aggregated JSON payloads to an MQTT broker at 1-minute intervals. Designed to run on a Raspberry Pi with the existing weather station hardware.
objective: Collect and publish temperature (°C and °F), relative humidity (%), accumulated rainfall (mm), and wind speed (km/h and m/s) at 1-minute intervals with full MQTT telemetry and local error logging.
constraints: Python 3.11; Raspberry Pi 4; paho-mqtt broker on local network; 1-minute logging interval; graceful retry on sensor read failure (up to 3 attempts); station_id configurable via environment variable.
supporting_fact_titles: Sensor Reading to MQTT Payload Transform
design_element_titles: Weather Station Temperature and Humidity Sensing

element_usage_notes.Weather Station Temperature and Humidity: DHT22 on GPIO pin 4 (BCM); retry up to 3 times on read failure; dual-unit output (°C and °F) fed into telemetry payload.
element_usage_notes.Weather Station Rainfall Measurement: Reed-switch interrupt on GPIO pin 17 (BCM); calibration_factor=0.2794 mm/tip (Davis sensor); tip_count reset after each 1-minute logging cycle.
element_usage_notes.Weather Station Wind Speed Measurement: Reed-switch interrupt on GPIO pin 27 (BCM); three 1-second windows averaged per logging cycle; calibration_factor=2.4 km/h per Hz.
element_usage_notes.Weather Station Telemetry Publishing: station_id read from STATION_ID environment variable; MQTT broker at mqtt://localhost:1883; topic weather/{station_id}/reading; QoS 1; retry up to 3 times on publish failure.

element_interactions.from: Weather Station Temperature and Humidity Sensing
element_interactions.data: dict with keys temperature_c (float), temperature_f (float), humidity_pct (float)
element_interactions.description: read_temperature_humidity() output is merged into the aggregated reading dict passed to publish_reading().
read_and_reset_rainfall() returns a single float keyed as 'rainfall_mm' in the aggregated reading dict.

read_wind_speed() output is merged into the aggregated reading dict. Wind measurement blocks for ~3 s (3 × 1-second windows) and runs before the other sensors to consume that time at the start of each cycle.

integration_code:
"""weather_station.py — main entry point for the Weather Station Software project.

Orchestrates all four design elements in a 60-second logging loop:
  1. Weather Station Wind Speed Measurement  (blocks ~3 s for 3-window average)
  2. Weather Station Temperature and Humidity Sensing  (GPIO DHT22 read, retried)
  3. Weather Station Rainfall Measurement  (reads + resets tip counter)
  4. Weather Station Telemetry Publishing  (merges readings → MQTT JSON payload)
"""

import logging
import time

import RPi.GPIO as GPIO

# Design element modules
from temperature_humidity import read_temperature_humidity, setup_temperature_humidity
from rainfall import read_and_reset_rainfall, setup_rain_gauge
from wind_speed import read_wind_speed, setup_anemometer
from telemetry import publish_reading

LOG_INTERVAL_S: int = 60

logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.INFO,
    format='%(asctime)s %(levelname)s %(message)s',
)
log = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def main() -> None:
    """Initialise hardware and run the main 60-second logging loop."""
    GPIO.setmode(GPIO.BCM)
    setup_rain_gauge(pin=17)
    setup_anemometer(pin=27)
    log.info('Weather station started. Logging every %d s.', LOG_INTERVAL_S)

    try:
        while True:
            cycle_start = time.monotonic()

            # --- 1. Wind speed (blocks for windows × 1 s) ---
            # Runs first so the 3-second sampling window fills part of the
            # 60-second interval rather than adding to it.
            wind = read_wind_speed(windows=3, calibration_factor=2.4)

            # --- 2. Temperature and humidity ---
            th = read_temperature_humidity(pin=4, retries=3)
            if th is None:
                log.warning('T/RH read failed after retries; skipping cycle.')
                time.sleep(max(0.0, LOG_INTERVAL_S - (time.monotonic() - cycle_start)))
                continue

            # --- 3. Rainfall (reads and resets the interrupt counter) ---
            rainfall_mm = read_and_reset_rainfall(mm_per_tip=0.2794)

            # --- 4. Merge all element outputs into one reading dict ---
            reading = {
                **th,                          # temperature_c, temperature_f, humidity_pct
                'rainfall_mm': rainfall_mm,    # from Rainfall element
                **wind,                        # wind_speed_kmh, wind_speed_ms
            }
            log.info('Reading: %s', reading)

            # --- 5. Publish via Telemetry element ---
            if not publish_reading(reading):
                log.error('Telemetry publish failed; reading lost.')

            # Sleep for the remainder of the 60-second interval.
            elapsed = time.monotonic() - cycle_start
            time.sleep(max(0.0, LOG_INTERVAL_S - elapsed))

    finally:
        GPIO.cleanup()
        log.info('GPIO cleaned up. Weather station stopped.')


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
